errors.description: Canonical governance state was produced from normalized evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive audit evidence.

errors.description: Canonical governance state could not be determined from available evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unknown governance state cannot authorize merge, runtime, or audit progression.

errors.description: Canonical governance state contains blocking reconciliation failures.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Governance orchestration must block until reconciliation evidence is deterministic.

errors.description: Event sequence was reconciled into a deterministic governance order.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive audit evidence.

errors.description: Event ordering, branch lifecycle, or commit evidence conflicts with canonical governance sequencing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Conflicting event chronology can hide stale or replayed workflow state.

errors.description: Governance authority source is missing, malformed, or not trusted.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Untrusted authority sources cannot establish canonical state.

errors.description: Governance authority source maps to ambiguous PR or workflow context.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Ambiguous authority can bind evidence to the wrong PR or branch.

errors.description: Canonical reconciliation hash was created from hash-only evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive audit evidence.

errors.description: Canonical governance reason registry requires synchronization.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Missing registry coverage prevents deterministic operator review.

errors.description: Runtime evidence hash is missing from canonical governance state.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime parity cannot be treated as validated without runtime evidence.

errors.description: Policy version hash is missing from canonical governance state.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Policy lineage is required before governance state can be trusted.

errors.description: Policy version hash is malformed or mismatched.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Policy hash drift can indicate stale or unauthorized governance policy.
